ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.
M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: Over the past 4 months: How often did the following happen to you? People have said mean or rude things about me because of my race or ethnic group.
Over the past 4 months: How often did the following happen to you? People have excluded me from a site because of my race or ethnic group online.
Over the past 4 months: How often did the following happen to you? People have threatened me online with violence because of my race or ethnic group.
Over the past 4 months: How often did the following happen to you? People have shown me a racist image online.
Over the past 4 months: How often did the following happen to you? People have cracked jokes about people of my race or ethnic group online.
Over the past 4 months: How often did the following happen to you? People have said things that were untrue about people in my race or ethnic group.
Over the past 4 months: How often did the following happen to you? I have witnessed people saying mean or rude things about another person's ethnic group online.
Over the past 4 months: How often did the following happen to you per day? People have said mean or rude things about me because of my race or ethnic group.
Notes: 0=Did not happen daily; 1=Happened once per day; 2=Happened twice per day; 3=Happened three times per day; 4=Happened four or more times per day
